titleStmt.title: SII 11.134: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 134. (B.K. No. 124 of 1926-27.) KURTAKŌṬI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB LYING ON THE TANK-BUND.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI). It praises the great qualities of Beḷkeyar-Eṟega, a member of the Two-Hundred Mahājanas of the agrahāra Kuṟitakūṇṭe, who built the temples of Vishṇu and Sarasvatī at Ermeganūr Kuṟipaṭṭi and a big well and a tank at Siriguppe. It records the gift of land made by him, by purchase from the Mahājanas, to the temple of Eṟe-Vishṇu Kēśavadēva, built by him.

The record is dated Śaka 1010, Prabhava, Śrāvaṇa, amāvāsyā, Sunday, solar eclipse. The details regularly correspond to A.D. 1087, August 1, Sunday. This is dated on the same day as No. 133 (No. 122 of 1926-27) above, though the Śaka year there is cited as 1009.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnna tadaṁṣṭrāgraviśrāntabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīpṛthvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭā raka satyāśra
yakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhi vṛddhipravarddha
māna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire . kaṁde . makarakaravihatabhīkaramakarākaravaḷayavaḷayitōrvvī
taḷamaṁ sakaḷaripunṛpabhayaṁkara nakaḷaṁkaṁ vikramāṁka nāḷuttamiral . vṛtta . vāridhivēṣṭi tāvanilatāṁgige
kuṁtaladēśamāsyamaṁtā ramaṇīyamappa mukhapaṁkaruhakke lalāṭadaṁte vistāradinoppi tōṟupudu be
ḷvala malli lalāmadondaḷaṁkārasamanvitaṁ kuṟitakūṁṭe virājipudī dharitriyoḷ . grāma da pūrvvadakṣi
ṇadiśāpravibhāgada yāgamaṇḍapastōmada hōmadhūmada kavilvoge parbbi digantarāḷadiṁ vyōmamane
yde nīḷdesavudabdhininādame vēdaghōṣameṁdī mahi baṇnikuṁ kuṟitakūṁṭeya viprajanāgra gaṇyara . kaṁda .
Avaroḷage vipravaṁśārṇnavahimakaranenisi saṁda peṁpaṁ taḷedaṁ bhuvanastutyaṁ vidvaṁnivahōttama natyudāri piṭṭeya
bhaṭṭa . vṛtta . saṁgatanītiśāstraviditaṁge dharāmarapūjyavēdavēdāṁgaviśāradaṁge nijagōtranabhōmaṇisannibhaṁge
sōttuṁgaguṇānvitaṁge harabhaktiyoḷunnatanappa piṭṭimayyaṁgeṇe satyavākya ruditōditarā ro mahītaḷāgra
doḷ . kaṁda . Ātana samastabhuvanakhyātana suta nakhiḷaśāstrapariṇateyeḍeyoḷ nūtanakamaḷa jane
nisida nītividaṁ nāgavarmma nanupamadharmma . sītege rōhiṇige kubhṛjjāte garundhatige ratige patibhaktiyoḷē māto
migilenisi negardda vibhūtiya cāvuṇḍa kabbe gajñarddoreyē . Antavargge vuṭṭidaṁ cairantana caritaṁ vinūta vinayāṁ
budhi yatyantadayāparanamadaṁ māntana deṟevaṭṭudāri beḷkeyareṟega . śrōtriyatanado ḷviśvāmitrānva
yaradhikaralli kuḷamaṁ beḷagalgōtrōttama nudiyisidaṁ dhātrītaḷapūjyanenipa beḷkeyareṟega . keṟe yaṟavaṁ
ṭage satra mivaṟikeya vatyāptaguptadānamanadha nāraṟiva rbbeḷkeyareṟegani neṟe kṛtakṛtyaṁ kṛtārtthanī vasuma
tiyoḷ . Eṟagaṁ bhayalōbhadvayakeṟagaṁ duśśīḷaduṣṭadurjjanajanadatteṟagaṁ saccaritētarggaṟivaṁ cāritra
jaḷadhi beḷkeyareṟega . vṛtta . paṁkajanābhanāyatanamaṁ tridaśēṁdravimānadaṁdamādaṁ kamanīyamādu
dena lermmeganūrkkuṟipaṭṭiyalli pāśāṁkuśapustakābhayavirājitahaste sarasvatīnivāsaṁ kaḍuramya
māytenisi māḍidanē neṟegaṁ kritārtthanō . kaṁda . siriguppeyoḷādaradiṁ marakaṭṭina piriya bāviyuṁ
keṟeyuma naccariyene māḍi samastōrvvaregellaṁ negarddanalte beḷkeyareṟega . svastyanēka guṇagaṇā
ḷaṁkṛta mukhakamaḷavinirggata vēdavēdāṁgōpāṁgānēkaśāstrāṣṭādaśasmṛtipurāṇa vāgbhūṣaṇa ryyamaniyama
svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunānuṣṭhānaparāyaṇa rvviditavēdārtthavidyāpāraga rṣaṭkarmma nirata rssaptasōma
saṁsthāvabhṛthāvagāhanapavitrīkṛtaśarīra rpparamaparōpakāriga ḷāśśritajanakaḷpavṛkṣa rēkavākya rdduṣṭanigraha
viśiṣṭapratipāḷakarappa śrīmadagrahāraṁ kuṟitakūṁṭeyūroḍeyapramukha maśēṣamahājanavirṇnū
rvvarggaṁ pogarttegaṁ negarttegaṁ nikētanamāda beḷkeyareṟeyamayyaṁ niṭaḷataṭaghaṭitakarakamaḷamukuḷī
kṛtanāgi tanna māḍisida śrīmadeṟeviṣṇu kēśavadēvargge gandhapuṣpadhūpadīpanivēdyādigaḷga maṁgabhōgakkaṁ
dravyapūrvvakaṁ prasādisi . sakavarṣa 1010 neya prabhava saṁvatsarada śrāvaṇadamāvāsye Ā
dityavāraṁ sūryyagrahaṇada tātkālikadoḷ śaṁkaraṣaṇaṁgiyara paḍuvaṇa mattarvvasu
geyoḷ sarbbanamaśyaṁ sarbbabādhāparihāramā girppattanālku gēṇa kōlo ḷkoṇḍu biṭṭa ma
ttarirppattanālka daṟoḷa geṟeviṣṇu kēśavadēvargge matta 20 Ā dēvara dēguladiṁ mūḍaṇapore
yoḷagaṇagniṣṭhageya maṭhakke goṭṭa mattar 4 Idanūroḍeyapramukhamahājana virnnū
rbbaruṁ svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisuvar . kaṁda . dēvadvijagurubhakta rśśrīvanitādhīśa renisu virnnū
rbbaridaṁ kāvarkkeykoḷva rbhbhūdēvōttama rindusūryyaruḷḷannevara . Enitoḷavu nadīnadaca
yamanituṁ śrīpuṇyatīrtthado ḷvēdavida rgganurāgade gōdhēnuva nanitānuma nittanintidaṁ kā
dāta . gaṁgāyamunānaditīrtthaṁgaḷoḷaṁtī viditavēdavēdāṁgavidōttuṁgadvijajanagōkuḷamaṁ
gaḍa vadhiyisida pūtanidanaḷidāta . Iṁtī dharmmamanārorbba rkkādaravargge prayāge vā
raṇāsi kurukṣētra gaṁge gaṁgāsāgarameṁba puṇyatīrtthasthānaṁgaḷoḷ sāyirakavi
leya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ paṁcaratnaṁgaḷoḷkaṭṭisi caturvvēdapāragarappa mahāritvijarkka ḷgu
bhayamukhigoṭṭa phala vidanaḷida ninitumanaḷidu narakaṁbūkka paṁcamahāpātaka nakkuṁ .
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasēturnṛpāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarbbānētā nbhāginaḥ
pārtthivēṁdrānbhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadraḥ . bahubhirvvasudhā bhuktā rājabhi
ssagarādibhiḥ yasyayasya yadā bhūmi stasyatasya tadā phaḷaṁ . svaṁ dātuṁ sumahacchakyaṁ duḥ
kamanyasya pāḷanaṁ dānaṁ vā pāḷanaṁ vēti dānācchrēyōnupāḷanaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . ©
Intī śāsanagabbamanentu vicāripoḍe vucitameṁbantire vikrāntadhanaṁ jayalakṣmīkāntaṁ poṁbo
ḷala nāgadēvaṁ pēḷdaṁ . parahitarinnūrvvara padasarasīruhāmōdamadhukaraṁ śivabha
ktaṁ karavatiśayamāgire vistaradiṁ kuḷakaraṇi mābalāryyaṁ bareda . ©
maṁṭūrāyṭōjana besa .
Digital edition of SII 11.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
